member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Clients.MitsubishiMxComponentPlcClient
member.summary: Provides a Mitsubishi MX Component PLC client.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Clients.MitsubishiMxComponentPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Clients.MitsubishiMxComponentPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Internal.IComObjectFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Clients.MitsubishiMxComponentPlcClient.Options
member.summary: Gets the MX Component options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Devices.MitsubishiMxDeviceNameFormatter
member.summary: Formats Dreamine PLC addresses for MX Component device strings.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Devices.MitsubishiMxDeviceNameFormatter.Format(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress)
member.summary: Formats a PLC address for MX Component.
member.param: The PLC address. is the normalized numeric offset; X/Y/B/W offsets are rendered in hexadecimal for MX Component device names.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Devices.MitsubishiMxDeviceNameFormatter.FormatOffset(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats a PLC address after applying an offset delta.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Internal.DefaultComObjectFactory
member.summary: Creates installed COM objects through their ProgID.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Internal.IComObjectFactory
member.summary: Creates late-bound COM objects.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Internal.IComObjectFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a COM object from a ProgID.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions
member.summary: Provides Mitsubishi MX Component connection options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.DefaultProgId
member.summary: Gets the default MX Component ProgID for the current process bitness.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.ProgId
member.summary: Gets or sets the MX Component COM ProgID.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.LogicalStationNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the logical station number configured in MX Component.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.OpenMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Open method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.CloseMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Close method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.ReadDeviceMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the single-device read method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.WriteDeviceMethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the single-device write method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.ReadDeviceBlock2MethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the block word read method name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Mitsubishi.MxComponent.Options.MitsubishiMxComponentOptions.WriteDeviceBlock2MethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the block word write method name.
